GpuSortPreservingMergeExec: [channel@0 ASC, col_name@1 ASC, d_year@2 ASC, d_qoy@3 ASC, i_category@4 ASC]
  GpuSortExec: expr=[channel@0 ASC, col_name@1 ASC, d_year@2 ASC, d_qoy@3 ASC, i_category@4 ASC], fetch=100
    GpuProjectExec: expr=[channel@0 as channel, col_name@1 as col_name, d_year@2 as d_year, d_qoy@3 as d_qoy, i_category@4 as i_category, count(*)@5 as sales_cnt, sum(foo.ext_sales_price)@6 as sales_amt]
      GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[channel, col_name, d_year, d_qoy, i_category], aggr=[count(*), sum(foo.ext_sales_price)]
        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=2796202
          GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([channel@0, col_name@1, d_year@2, d_qoy@3, i_category@4], 8), input_partitions=24
            GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[channel, col_name, d_year, d_qoy, i_category], aggr=[count(*), sum(foo.ext_sales_price)]
              GpuUnionExec
                GpuProjectExec: expr=[store as channel, ss_store_sk as col_name, d_year@4 as d_year, d_qoy@5 as d_qoy, i_category@2 as i_category, ss_ext_sales_price@1 as ext_sales_price]
                  GpuProjectExec: expr=[ss_sold_date_sk@3 as ss_sold_date_sk, ss_ext_sales_price@4 as ss_ext_sales_price, i_category@5 as i_category, d_date_sk@0 as d_date_sk, d_year@1 as d_year, d_qoy@2 as d_qoy]
                    GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=2796202
                      GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(d_date_sk@0, ss_sold_date_sk@0)]
                        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=2796202

                        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=2796202

                                          GpuScanExec: batch_size=2796202
